---
name: Beta feedback
about: Tell us how the install/setup went and what to fix
title: "[beta] "
labels: ["beta"]
---

Thanks for testing Helm! A few quick things help a lot:

**Your setup**
- OS + version: (e.g. macOS 15 / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24)
- Install method: (npx · curl install.sh · PowerShell install.ps1 · manual)
- Backend: (Claude subscription · API key · free local (Ollama) · free online (Groq/OpenRouter))

**How far did you get?**
- [ ] Installer finished
- [ ] Wizard finished, `.env` written
- [ ] Bot came online in Discord
- [ ] It replied to a message
- [ ] It actually did a task

**What broke (if anything)**
- The step it failed at:
- The exact error / what you saw:
- The startup line if you have it (`✅ Helm online …` / `engine: …`), or anything from `agent.log`:

**First impression**
- What was confusing or rough?
- What worked well / what would make you keep using it?
